Through original programming, documentaries, and expert-led discussions, MHTN aims to increase awareness, provide valuable information, and encourage open conversations about mental well-being.

programme.title: Quo Vadis TV
programme.desc: Quo Vadis TV is committed to sharing the Biblical message in a way that makes Christian living practical, realistic, and attainable. Our theme is summarized the question: "where are you going?" Our Aim with this inquiry is to help people find orientation and find the path back to God.

Our theme is summarized the question: "where are you going?" Our Aim with this inquiry is to help people find orientation and find the path back to God.

programme.title: Distant Shores
programme.desc: The voyage through the islands of Denmark continue with a visit to Ærø;e Paul and Sheryl take a night tour through the fairy tale town of Ærøskøbing.

programme.title: Selling Yachts
programme.desc: Zack and Pricilla must make a final decision regarding the purchase of a new yacht for family and business use; they must choose between purchasing a yacht that will sit behind their estate or a larger yacht that will be docked at a marina.

programme.title: Road Less Traveled
programme.desc: Jonathan journeys to Ireland to learn about the collapse and resurgence of Irish whiskey. He takes to an adventure bike and explores pubs, road bowling, sheep herding and a bout with Santa Claus.

programme.title: A Taste of Travel
programme.desc: Explorers journey to idyllic places to try local cuisine, find out what destinations have to offer and share travel trips along the way.

programme.title: Find Me a Vacation Home
programme.desc: Property hunters look for luxurious vacation homes where paradise is in the backyard.

programme.title: Dream Cruises
programme.desc: Explore the Mississippi River from Minnesota to the Gulf of Mexico aboard the Queen of the Mississippi, a 19th-century replica steamboat.

programme.title: Find Me a Luxury Home
programme.desc: Shabi searches for her first home so she can move closer to her family and her brother joins her to help.

programme.title: Global Passport
programme.desc: Christina Cindrich visits the Amalfi Coast in Italy; this 25 mile-long stretch of postcard-perfect coastal towns have been a magnet for the jet-set and are easily one of the most beautiful regions in the whole world.

programme.title: When Night Falls in Istanbul
programme.desc: Tradition, chaos, constant upheaval: This is Istanbul. Some 16 million people live in this crowded city on the Bosporus. For many, it is a center of creativity. For others, a place that swallows them up.

programme.title: DW News
programme.desc: DW News goes deep beneath the surface, providing the key stories from Europe and around the world.

programme.title: Interview
programme.desc: Deutschlands NATO-Botschafter von Geyr warnt im DW-Interview vor Russland. Die Atmosphäre innerhalb der NATO sei angesichts des völkerrechtswidrigen Angriffs Russlands auf die Ukraine besorgt, aber auch besonnen und entschlossen. Russland möchte seine Nachbarn "dominieren statt überzeugen.

programme.title: In Good Shape
programme.desc: Stefanie Suren hosts a look into the various aspects of modern healthcare, including what new procedures have been adopted, alternative medications, the latest in wellness and fitness as well as an exploration into nutrition and beauty.

programme.title: DW News
programme.desc: DW News goes deep beneath the surface, providing the key stories from Europe and around the world.

programme.title: HER Women in Asia
programme.desc: Get to know three women from three different Asian countries who have found their own form of expression. How do themes such as femininity, gender roles, women's rights and violence feature in the works of these female artists? Malaysian artist Yante Ismail paints nude women, challenging the norms of patriarchal Society.

programme.desc: Eco India, a magazine dedicated to the amazing Indian subcontinent. The show features compelling subjects in Asia and Europe: environment, sustainability, technology and social themes.

programme.title: Don’t hold back
programme.desc: What happens when the bond with our mothers is broken or painful? Join author and coach Moshitadi Lehlomela and Nozibele on ‘Don’t Hold Back’ as they explore the complex Mother Wound — its impact, the myths, and the transformative path to healing and self-mothering. This is a conversation for anyone ready to reclaim their strength and grace.

programme.title: Focus on Europe Spotlight on People
programme.desc: The government plans to grant residency to about half a million migrants, aiming to boost the job market. +++ Deep in a forest, criminals try to turn their lives around, with community support instead of prison.

programme.title: Eco Africa Clean energy brings hope to Ghana’s drought-plagued north
programme.desc: Decreased rainfall once meant crop failure, but solar irrigation is reshaping farming in northern Ghana. Plus: Thermal cooking bags help women in Cameroon.

programme.title: The Dip
programme.desc: Threats of so called "de-dollarization" have been bubbling up for years. Whether its Trump's tariffs, the US's aggressive sanctions regime or monetary policy -- all have been used by governments around the world to float the idea of moving away from the Greenback. But how realistic is this plan, really?

programme.title: Tomorrow Today How stress makes your mind go blank — the science behind it
programme.desc: Why stress hormones can trigger sudden ‘brain freeze’ in interviews, exams or live broadcasts - and what you can do about it. Also: smart textiles, building with popcorn, a tool-using cow and vital aquatic fungi.

programme.title: DW News
programme.desc: DW News goes deep beneath the surface, providing the key stories from Europe and around the world.

programme.title: Shift Living in the Digital Age
programme.desc: Can I use blockchain technology? Will artificial intelligence take over my career? What exactly is "Machine Learning"? These are some of the questions „SHIFT – Living in the Digital Age“ tries to answer. The program focuses on a single topic – in depth and in detail. We talk to experts, present the key facts and explain complicated subjects in a simple manner. SHIFT – substantial, never superficial.

programme.title: Arts unveiled
programme.desc: Berlin - THE hotspot for spies. Nowhere else did the secret services of East and West clash as closely as in this city on the frontlines of the Cold War. Arts Unveiled delves into the shadows of Berlin and uncovers incredible stories from ex-agents.

programme.desc: From a bribe demanded on the streets of Kinshasa to families in Kenya paying the price for broken systems, young Africans are questioning who truly benefits — and who pays. On The 77 Percent, we explore grassroots initiatives empowering communities to navigate corruption and reclaim control.

programme.desc: Hardie tries to prevent a lynching when a town's hard cases accuse a Basque sheepherder of the abduction a young girl.

programme.title: Lust for Gold
programme.desc: During the 1870s, the ruthless Jacob Walz (Glenn Ford) becomes very wealthy after locating a legendary Arizona gold mine and securing sole ownership by murdering his partner. Walz then travels to Phoenix, where he catches the attention of a beautiful and crafty woman named Julia Thomas (Ida Lupino), who has learned of his exploits. Eventually, Walz falls in love with Julia, unaware that she's already married to Pete (Gig Young), who is eyeing his fortune.

programme.title: Wagon Train

programme.desc: Over the course of a single day, a U.S. marshal (Buddy Roosevelt) navigates the trails of the Wild West and attempts to enforce the law. The bandit Black Pete (Olin Francis) makes it difficult for him. But the brave marshal forges on, facing violent outlaws, stagecoach holdups, scams, ambushes, arson and robberies. He even assumes the role of the groom in a hasty marriage ceremony for the lovely Dorothy Horton (Patsy Bellamy), who must be married by noon to claim her inheritance.

programme.title: Think Big
programme.desc: Children are the future -- and so are their inventions, which is why "Think Big" could be an important show. It features young inventors competing to see who can come up with the most-innovative invention. Each episode features two teams in the Think Tank -- a studio filled with art supplies and construction materials -- who brainstorm and choose materials before sketching, designing and building a prototype to be presented to a judge, who determines a winner. The champions earn bragging rights and the coveted Genius Cup.

programme.title: Biz Kids

programme.title: America's Heartland
programme.desc: Much of the food Americans eat is produced by farmers and ranchers in the country's heartland, but many people don't know how it's produced. "America's Heartland" provides information about the people and processes responsible for the availability of food and fuel across the country and around the world. The show's reporters and producers tell stories in topics that include farm families, consumer issues, animal welfare and crop sustainability. Some episodes also take the show abroad to countries such as Egypt and Taiwan to show the impact American agriculture has on the global economy.

programme.title: Hellgate
programme.desc: After the Civil War, ranch owner Gil Hanley helps a stranger in desperate need of medical attention. Soon he is questioned by Union soldiers about the stranger, who turns out to be an ex-Confederate soldier. Hanley, also an ex-Confederate, is unjustly convicted as a conspirator and sentenced to life in a brutal desert prison in New Mexico. After battling his tough cellmate and a sadistic guard, Hanley tries to stop a plague from overwhelming the prison.

programme.title: Beautiful Homes & Great Estates
programme.desc: The first zero-carbon-ready certified home in California.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: S5 E11 Lone Patrol Cheyenne scouts for Army troops one last time to deliver supplies to Fort Burnside with both inexperienced Captain Duquesne and Trooper Daily. The captain dismisses Cheyenne's concerns over the Shoshone, who later attack them.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: S5 E12 Massacre at Gunsight Pass Cheyenne travels on a stagecoach to deliver prisoner Johnny Eldorado to Fort Bridger. When an arrogant Russian passenger shoots and kills a Shoshone brave on the way, they must hurry to a relay station to find safety.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: S2 E4 The Mill Tom Edwards is in a wheelchair and holds Ben Cartwright responsible for his condition. When Tom turns to drinking to ease his pain, the Cartwrights work together to help him find purpose in his life again.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S2 E19 Hero While hunting, Colly Vane encounters a dangerous outlaw, The Domino Kid, who forces Vane to shoot him. When he brings the body back to town, it's discovered he was shot in the back. Instead of being a hero, Vane faces danger.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S2 E20 The Horse Traders Kansas Sawyer is Lucas' friend who was cheated in a horse-trading deal. Lucas investigates Colonel Bourbon's operation and discovers his illegal process. He also learns that the horse Sawyer bought was stolen and is being sought after by outlaws.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S2 E21 The Spoiler An elderly couple move to North Fork and settle down under a false name to keep the town from knowing they are parents of a vicious killer on the loose. However, their plan fails when their son shows up and causes chaos.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S2 E22 Heller A teenage girl named Heller and her brother are abused by her drunken stepfather. The town becomes aware after Heller is caught stealing from the general store. The children plan the drunk's demise as the cruelty continues. Lucas steps in to help.

programme.title: Kansas Pacific
programme.desc: With talks of a Civil War brewing, Southern saboteurs know they must keep Northern forces from using the U.S. train system. They devise a daring and dangerous plan to stop and capture a railroad engine, preventing the completion of a railroad line.

programme.title: The Tall Tales of Jim Bridger
programme.desc: S1 E2 The Spirit of Truth After his fur trapping expedition is surprised by a Crow war party, legendary mountain man Jim Bridger suddenly finds himself in a desperate struggle to rescue his fellow trappers when one of them goes missing, and another is on the brink of madness.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S2 E36 The Hangman Lucas arrives at Eban Muchen's ranch to deliver supplies. He finds Muchen's body and hired hand, Voleny Adams, right next to him. Adams denies he killed Muchen, but no one in town believes the ex-convict and want him to hang.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S3 E1 Trail of Hate Three bank robbers come to the McCain Ranch and force Lucas into helping them rob the North Fork Bank. One robber stays behind to guard Mark while the other two take Lucas to town. They threaten to kill Mark, unless Lucas cooperates with the gunmen.

programme.title: Buffalo Keepers
programme.desc: S1 E1 Today, the buffalo is the quintessential symbol of strength, freedom, and the unspoiled American West. But in the late 1800s, the nation's buffalo were nearly wiped out by ruthless hide hunters. Those majestic herds, which once numbered in the tens of millions, were down to less than 500 animals. This is the story of the handful of determined men and women who mobilized to save the ones that were left in a last-ditch effort to stave off extinction. Ranchers like Charles and Mary Ann Goodnight rescued orphaned buffalo calves and built small herds. Former buffalo hunters like Buffalo Bill helped build public sympathy. And politicians like Theodore Roosevelt helped pass laws to protect the remaining animals. The effort would be a generational one, with buffalo herds carefully tended, bred, and passed down to new stewards when their old protectors passed away. Thanks to their efforts, there are an estimated 500,000 buffalo thundering across America's grasslands once again.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S1 E2 The Dalton Gang Bat Masterson, legendary gunfighter and sheriff, is now working as a newspaperman. He heads west again to uncover the real story behind the most brazen bank robbery of the Old West. Masterson tracks down the sole survivor of the Dalton Gang, who relives the horrible day when they attempted to rob two banks at the same time. The youngest of the Dalton brothers, Emmett Dalton describes how the gang was gunned down as they tried to make their getaway. Despite numerous gunshot wounds, Emmett lived to serve his time in prison and renounce his life of crime.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S1 E3 The Great Train Robbery Bat Masterson, former gunfighter and sheriff, is now working as a newspaperman. He heads west again to uncover the story behind one of the country's greatest train robberies. Although Butch and Sundance are long gone, Masterson tracks down Sundance's former girlfriend, Etta Place, to draw out more details. To pull off the audacious robbery, they used official Union Pacific lanterns to signal the train and fool the engineer into believing a bridge was out. As Etta reluctantly relives the events of the robbery and its aftermath, it's obvious that she is still smitten by Sundance after all of these years.

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier
programme.desc: S4 E1 Joe Meek: A Fearless Fighter Already a seasoned mountain man, Joe Meek has a reputation for raw courage and bravery among the trappers of the west. But Meek becomes a frontier legend when he risks his life in a fearless charge to save the woman that he loves from Crow warriors.

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: S3 E22 'Til Death Do Us Part Part 2 The Kid and Lou's wedding day arrives. The advancement of the Civil War forces the riders to take sides. Jesse must choose between his brother Frank or his friends in the Pony Express. An encounter with renegade rebels ends in tragedy.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: S1 E3 The Spanish Grant The Cartwrights are in a battle over the validity of a Spanish land grant. They plan to stop the De La Cuesta family from seizing part of the Ponderosa along with all of the Carson Valley settlers' homestead lands.

programme.title: Red Sun
programme.desc: In 1870, a gang robs a train carrying Japanese diplomats. The gang takes an ornate Japanese sword meant as a gift for the U.S. president. Now, a gunman and samurai must lay their differences aside and work together to recover the priceless gift.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S5 E18 Hostages to Fortune On Halloween, Mark and his friends wear masks and go from ranch to ranch to play pranks. Knowing the boys will be blamed, rustlers wear similar masks to steal cattle. Lucas thinks the boys are mixed up in the theft, until he finds out the truth.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S2 E4 Bulls on the Beach While the cowboys are sorting the herd, Cody suffers a close call on the job that sets off a string of bad luck as he plans his annual rodeo, Bulls on the Beach. He struggles to impress a potential sponsor and the entire event is put in jeopardy when the bulls don't arrive as scheduled. Bubba heads to Mississippi to work for his father-in-law and try his hand at office life. Booger and Jaclyn enjoy learning the first dance for their wedding, but Booger finds himself awkwardly out of place as the only man at their bridal shower!

programme.title: Kansas Pacific
programme.desc: With talks of a Civil War brewing, Southern saboteurs know they must keep Northern forces from using the U.S. train system. They devise a daring and dangerous plan to stop and capture a railroad engine, preventing the completion of a railroad line.

programme.desc: S4 E1 Joe Meek: A Fearless Fighter Already a seasoned mountain man, Joe Meek has a reputation for raw courage and bravery among the trappers of the west. programme.desc: S3 E22 'Til Death Do Us Part Part 2 The Kid and Lou's wedding day arrives. The advancement of the Civil War forces the riders to take sides. Jesse must choose between his brother Frank or his friends in the Pony Express. An encounter with renegade rebels ends in tragedy.

programme.desc: In 1870, a gang robs a train carrying Japanese diplomats. The gang takes an ornate Japanese sword meant as a gift for the U.S. president. Now, a gunman and samurai must lay their differences aside and work together to recover the priceless gift.

programme.desc: S5 E18 Hostages to Fortune On Halloween, Mark and his friends wear masks and go from ranch to ranch to play pranks. Knowing the boys will be blamed, rustlers wear similar masks to steal cattle. Lucas thinks the boys are mixed up in the theft, until he finds out the truth.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S2 E4 Bulls on the Beach While the cowboys are sorting the herd, Cody suffers a close call on the job that sets off a string of bad luck as he plans his annual rodeo, Bulls on the Beach. He struggles to impress a potential sponsor and the entire event is put in jeopardy when the bulls don't arrive as scheduled. Bubba heads to Mississippi to work for his father-in-law and try his hand at office life. Booger and Jaclyn enjoy learning the first dance for their wedding, but Booger finds himself awkwardly out of place as the only man at their bridal shower!

programme.title: War of the Wildcats
programme.desc: During the early days of the Oklahoma oil boom, a greedy, self-assured oilman and a quiet, yet determined cowboy fight for the rights to oil on Indian land. All the while a pretty schoolteacher steals both men's hearts.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: S1 E10 San Francisco Ben, Hoss and Joe decide to visit San Francisco with some of their ranch hands. The hands vanish into the crowds and while searching for them, Ben finds himself shanghaied and on a ship destined for Hong Kong.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: S1 E11 Bitter Water When miner Lem Keith plans to buy land next to the Ponderosa, he goes to the owner's son, Todd, who is willing to help Lem because he is in love with Lem's daughter. Plus, they both share a common hatred of the Cartwrights.

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier
programme.desc: S1 E3 Jim Beckwourth: War Chief of the Crow When former slave Jim Beckwourth heads west to seek work as a trapper, he begins what will become one of the most eventful, heroic lives of all the mountain men. As a joke, one of Beckwourth's fellow trappers tells a group of Crow warriors that Beckwourth is a long-lost member of their tribe, and the adventure begins. Adopted by the Crow, Beckwourth joins them in a series of ferocious battles with other tribes, becomes a war chief, and falls in love with a fierce female warrior named Pine Leaf. He then uses his hard-won influence with the Crow to convince them to provide furs to the powerful American Fur Company. But an unexpected visit from legendary trapper and old friend Tom Fitzpatrick sets off a violent collision that forces Beckwourth to choose between the two worlds he loves.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S4 E10 Willie Kennard Makes His Mark in History Under siege by gunslingers, the gold mining town of Yankee Hill runs a newspaper advertisement to find a new marshal. Former slave and Union soldier Willie Kennard answers the ad, but he faces prejudice and doubt as he works to restore law and order.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S1 E13 Stagecoach Mary While working as a groundskeeper at a convent in Ohio, former slave Mary Fields forms a deep friendship with the superior, Mother Amadeus Dunne. When Mother Amadeus falls ill after traveling to Montana to open a girls' school, Mary rushes to her rescue and nurses her back to health. Mary soon discovers that the Western Frontier satisfies her free-spirited nature, and she decides to stay in Montana for good. She secures a contract to deliver mail by stagecoach for the U.S. Postal Service, becoming the first African American woman to carry mail. With a fearless attitude and multiple firearms, she protects the mail from would-be bandits and is soon known far and wide. Some years later, legendary gunfighter-turned-newspaperman Bat Masterson meets Sister Amadeus and gets the true story of Stagecoach Mary.

programme.title: Elkhorn
programme.desc: S1 E6 On the Hunt Looking for a distraction from his tasks at Elkhorn Ranch, Theodore Roosevelt decides a hunting expedition to the Bighorn Mountains of Wyoming might just settle his mind, but he soon finds himself face to face with a man-eating grizzly bear.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S1 E25 One Went to Denver Tom Birch, an old childhood friend, comes to visit Lucas unexpectedly. Birch promises he is just passing through on his way to Denver. But Lucas soon finds out about a plot to rob the North Fork Bank and must choose between friendship and justice.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S1 E26 The Deadly Wait Just released from prison, Dan Maury comes to North Fork in search of Marshal Micah Torrance, who helped get him locked up. Torrance carries a shotgun everywhere he goes, but Maury plans to wait him out.

programme.title: Rage at Dawn
programme.desc: In 1866, the Reno Brothers gang is ravaging Indiana. When a detective agency sends a man to infiltrate the gang by posing as an outlaw, he sets a trap to capture the gang during an early-morning train robbery.

programme.title: Black Fox: The Price of Peace
programme.desc: A Texas woman falls in love with a Kiowa brave, and chooses to remain with him rather than return to her demanding and abusive husband. Driven by bitterness and rage, the husband soon forms a hunting party set on recapturing his bride, at any price.

programme.title: War of the Wildcats
programme.desc: During the early days of the Oklahoma oil boom, a greedy, self-assured oilman and a quiet, yet determined cowboy fight for the rights to oil on Indian land. All the while a pretty schoolteacher steals both men's hearts.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: S1 E10 San Francisco Ben, Hoss and Joe decide to visit San Francisco with some of their ranch hands. The hands vanish into the crowds and while searching for them, Ben finds himself shanghaied and on a ship destined for Hong Kong.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: S1 E11 Bitter Water When miner Lem Keith plans to buy land next to the Ponderosa, he goes to the owner's son, Todd, who is willing to help Lem because he is in love with Lem's daughter. Plus, they both share a common hatred of the Cartwrights.

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier
programme.desc: S1 E3 Jim Beckwourth: War Chief of the Crow When former slave Jim Beckwourth heads west to seek work as a trapper, he begins what will become one of the most eventful, heroic lives of all the mountain men. As a joke, one of Beckwourth's fellow trappers tells a group of Crow warriors that Beckwourth is a long-lost member of their tribe, and the adventure begins. Adopted by the Crow, Beckwourth joins them in a series of ferocious battles with other tribes, becomes a war chief, and falls in love with a fierce female warrior named Pine Leaf. He then uses his hard-won influence with the Crow to convince them to provide furs to the powerful American Fur Company. But an unexpected visit from legendary trapper and old friend Tom Fitzpatrick sets off a violent collision that forces Beckwourth to choose between the two worlds he loves.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S4 E10 Willie Kennard Makes His Mark in History Under siege by gunslingers, the gold mining town of Yankee Hill runs a newspaper advertisement to find a new marshal. Former slave and Union soldier Willie Kennard answers the ad, but he faces prejudice and doubt as he works to restore law and order.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S1 E13 Stagecoach Mary While working as a groundskeeper at a convent in Ohio, former slave Mary Fields forms a deep friendship with the superior, Mother Amadeus Dunne. When Mother Amadeus falls ill after traveling to Montana to open a girls' school, Mary rushes to her rescue and nurses her back to health. Mary soon discovers that the Western Frontier satisfies her free-spirited nature, and she decides to stay in Montana for good. She secures a contract to deliver mail by stagecoach for the U.S. Postal Service, becoming the first African American woman to carry mail. With a fearless attitude and multiple firearms, she protects the mail from would-be bandits and is soon known far and wide. Some years later, legendary gunfighter-turned-newspaperman Bat Masterson meets Sister Amadeus and gets the true story of Stagecoach Mary.

programme.title: Elkhorn
programme.desc: S1 E6 On the Hunt Looking for a distraction from his tasks at Elkhorn Ranch, Theodore Roosevelt decides a hunting expedition to the Bighorn Mountains of Wyoming might just settle his mind, but he soon finds himself face to face with a man-eating grizzly bear.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S1 E25 One Went to Denver Tom Birch, an old childhood friend, comes to visit Lucas unexpectedly. Birch promises he is just passing through on his way to Denver. But Lucas soon finds out about a plot to rob the North Fork Bank and must choose between friendship and justice.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S1 E26 The Deadly Wait Just released from prison, Dan Maury comes to North Fork in search of Marshal Micah Torrance, who helped get him locked up. Torrance carries a shotgun everywhere he goes, but Maury plans to wait him out.

programme.title: Rage at Dawn
programme.desc: In 1866, the Reno Brothers gang is ravaging Indiana. When a detective agency sends a man to infiltrate the gang by posing as an outlaw, he sets a trap to capture the gang during an early-morning train robbery.

programme.title: Black Fox: The Price of Peace
programme.desc: A Texas woman falls in love with a Kiowa brave, and chooses to remain with him rather than return to her demanding and abusive husband. Driven by bitterness and rage, the husband soon forms a hunting party set on recapturing his bride, at any price.

programme.title: Far Haven
programme.desc: In 1887, Hunter Braddock moves back to Far Haven, Arizona to start over with his two young children, but when his father-in-law is brutally attacked he must take on the corrupt forces strangling the town in order to protect what he loves most.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: S2 E14 Survival of the Fittest An army captain arrives at Fort Courage and tells Captain Permenter that two troops must undergo a survival test in the wilderness. Parmenter decides to go with Agarn. Realizing they must survive on their own, the two face challenges finding food.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: S2 E15 Bring on the Dancing Girls A new saloon owner named Dan Lawson takes over O'Rourke and Agarn's business. He quickly raises prices and adds a cover charge, angering the regular patrons. Lawson adds new entertainment with dancing can-can girls creating quite the spectacle.

programme.title: McLintock!
programme.desc: A cattle baron awaits the return of his daughter from school and is surprised that his wife has returned to take their daughter away. He tries to keep the peace and do what is best for everyone.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S2 E8 Ordeal Lucas and Mark travel through the desert to get a supply of salt when a rattlesnake spooks their horses, causing the wagon to overturn. A horse must be put down due to injury and Lucas is also badly hurt. Mark has no choice but to go for help alone.

programme.title: Streets of Laredo
programme.desc: S1 E1 Part 1 Retired Texas Ranger Captain Woodrow Call is asked to track down and capture a crafty long-distance killer who uses a buffalo gun and quickly disappears into the countryside. Texas railroad expansion can't move forward until this shooter is stopped!

programme.title: Streets of Laredo
programme.desc: S1 E2 Part 2 Captain Call learns he has more than just teenage, long-distance killer Joey Garza to hunt down, he must also bring the depraved outlaw Mox Mox and his gang to justice.

programme.title: Streets of Laredo
programme.desc: S1 E3 Part 3 While the posse continues their mission to capture or kill Joey Garza, Captain Call breaks off from his men to pursue Mox Mox. Meanwhile, Lorena searches for Pea and Joey's mother while Maria tries to help her murderous son elude the law.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S1 E16 The Sheridan Story At the end of the Civil War, General Sheridan and his staff arrive at the McCain Ranch. Trouble begins when ex-confederate soldier and hired hand Frank Blandon confronts the general, who shot and wounded him in the war.

programme.title: Rage at Dawn
programme.desc: In 1866, the Reno Brothers gang is ravaging Indiana. When a detective agency sends a man to infiltrate the gang by posing as an outlaw, he sets a trap to capture the gang during an early-morning train robbery.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: S2 E10 Miss Parmenter Captain Wilton Parmenter's equally clumsy sister, Daphne, visits Fort Courage. She is on a mission to find a husband and soon sets her sights on Dobbs the bugler. In the process, she creates havoc for the F Troop while attempting to marry Dobbs.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: S2 E11 La Dolce Courage An Italian man, Emilio Barberini, and his beautiful daughter, Gina, visit the F Troop at Fort Courage. Her beauty attracts the attention of every man, but her hot-headed suitor is pursuing her and swears vengeance on anyone who even glances her way.

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: S1 E19 Man Behind the Badge Van Dorn, a corrupt businessman and the man responsible for the murder of Marshal Sam Cain's wife, comes to Sweetwater. First, he ousts Cain and takes over the town, and then he appoints his gang to be the law enforcement for the town.

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: S1 E20 Then There Was One Teaspoon travels to Texas with an old comrade to warn three aging veterans that someone has been murdering the last men who genuinely remember the Alamo. Jimmy and Buck follow from behind as Teaspoon tracks down the killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S2 E3 The Blowout Al Walker, a sick gunslinger, comes to North Fork hoping to die in peace. Knowing that his presence will attract outlaws, Micah and Lucas put him in protective custody. When outlaws set fire to the town, Walker dies a hero by standing up to them.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S2 E4 Obituary Newspaperman Byron Claremont writes an article about old gunslinger, Ben Russell, who settled down years ago. The article brings in a young gun, who murders Russell. Next, Claremont writes about Lucas McCain and his rifle, which brings more tragedy.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S2 E5 Tension Lucas and Mark help Sid Halpern with his cattle drive. When bounty hunter Clemmie Martin confronts Halpern and gunfire erupts, Halpern and Martin both perish. Lucas tries to hide Halpern's criminal past from his widow and son.

programme.title: Gunslinger
programme.desc: When a town marshal is gunned down, his wife bravely returns fire at the gunmen and kills one. The widow is named the town's temporary marshal. At her husband's funeral, she spies the second killer and plans to finish avenging her husband.

programme.title: Red Sun
programme.desc: In 1870, a gang robs a train carrying Japanese diplomats. The gang takes an ornate Japanese sword meant as a gift for the U.S. president. Now, a gunman and samurai must lay their differences aside and work together to recover the priceless gift.

programme.title: The Proud Rebel
programme.desc: A Confederate veteran battles prejudice and greed as he helps a woman save her ranch from a land grab, while searching for a cure for his mute son.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S7 E11 Let It Ripp The cowboys are busy processing cattle and preparing for an important shipment when a chute gets stuck, bringing work to a halt and risking time and money they can't afford to lose. Booger trains a cutting horse and enters it into its first competition. Cody organizes a campout for the youth at the Alabama Sheriff's Boys Ranch, and the guys share some of their cowboy wisdom with the hope of inspiring another generation to follow the cowboy way. Friends and family gather for a baby shower, where Bubba and Kaley reveal the name they've chosen for their new addition.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S7 E12 Final Cow Down, The During a long drought in lower Alabama, the cowboys have been chasing green grass throughout the surrounding area. Through new partnerships with other ranchers, they've finally ended up with a bumper crop of calves in north Alabama and a healthy herd in south Florida. Cody and Misty seek out the perfect high-value bull to build their growing cattle business, and they watch as their dream home finally takes shape. Bubba and Kaley welcome baby Ripp Walker Thompson into the world. Booger and Jaclyn surprise Grandma with a cowboy cookbook filled with her recipes and stories from life on the range.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S2 E18 The Visitor A pretty young widow named Ann Dodd passes through North Fork on her way to claim her inheritance. She and Lucas are immediately attracted to each other, but danger awaits as other heirs try to take Ann's life to get the inheritance for themselves.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S2 E19 Hero While hunting, Colly Vane encounters a dangerous outlaw, The Domino Kid, who forces Vane to shoot him. When he brings the body back to town, it's discovered he was shot in the back. Instead of being a hero, Vane faces danger.

programme.title: Elkhorn
programme.desc: S1 E1 The Greenhorn After suffering a great personal loss, 25-year-old Theodore Roosevelt abandons New York for the lawless Dakota Badlands. Along the way, he faces doubters and killers as he attempts to establish the Elkhorn Ranch and remake himself into a cattleman.

programme.title: Elkhorn
programme.desc: S1 E2 The Frenchman Before it's up and running, Theodore Roosevelt's new Elkhorn Ranch is threatened by a powerful neighbor who attempts an underhanded land grab. To save his ranch, Roosevelt confronts his neighbor, the Marquis de Morés, and his beguiling wife, Medora.

programme.title: Cavalry Charge
programme.desc: When two brothers each decide to fight on opposite sides in the Civil War, they never dreamed they would need to reunite and fight together. It is the only chance they have, if they hope to survive a brutal Indian attack.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: S4 E10 Alibi for the Scalped Man Cheyenne travels to Emmetville for his friend's wedding. When he arrives in town, he finds out that his friend is missing. Suspicious arise around the tight-lipped Emmet family and the bride-to-be who doesn't seemed concerned of his whereabouts.

programme.title: Elkhorn
programme.desc: S1 E7 Bandits When a masked bandit terrorizes the stagecoach line, killing a passenger, Theodore Roosevelt and his Elkhorn men join the citizens of Medora to track down the culprit. Can they lay a trap to catch the killer before he strikes again?

programme.title: Elkhorn
programme.desc: S1 E8 Crossroads After a wildfire rages through Elkhorn Ranch, Theodore Roosevelt is forced to sell some livestock before the fall roundup. But Roosevelt's pride prevents him from accepting a low offer from the town's founder, triggering a violent chain of events.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S1 E31 The Angry Man A neighboring rancher's son is seriously injured in an accident. With the young man's condition getting worse, Lucas learns the rancher won't take his son to the doctor since he feels his wife died from poor treatment.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S1 E32 The Woman The residents force Miss Adams, the North Fork schoolteacher, to leave her job because they feel she is too progressive for supporting women's right to vote. Lucas gets involved and he learns that lies have been circulated by a past student.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S1 E33 The Money Gun Lucas has a disdain for Oat Jackford since years ago he burned down his ranch to get him off property he wanted. When hired killer Tom King arrives in North Fork and is on Oat's trail, Lucas decides to side with and help the man he once hated.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S1 E34 A Matter of Faith A trail bum rides into North Fork during one of the worst droughts in years. He claims that he can bring rain to their town. Many believe that he's a water witcher, but a railroad boss resents his intrusion and wants him gone.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S7 E11 Let It Ripp The cowboys are busy processing cattle and preparing for an important shipment when a chute gets stuck, bringing work to a halt and risking time and money they can't afford to lose. programme.desc: S1 E34 A Matter of Faith A trail bum rides into North Fork during one of the worst droughts in years. He claims that he can bring rain to their town. Many believe that he's a water witcher, but a railroad boss resents his intrusion and wants him gone.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S1 E1 Bubba, Cody and Booger It's another busy week in South Alabama for cowboys Bubba, Cody, and Booger. Rancher and expert carpenter Bubba Thompson races to build furniture and prepare his house for his soon-to-be wife, Kaley. Rodeo champion and cattle dealer Cody Harris is struggling to carry on after selling his prized rodeo horse in order to buy a home with his new wife, Misty. And, expert cattleman and horse trainer Booger Brown gets a life changing job offer he must consider. Despite their own worries, Booger and Bubba pitch in to buy a new colt for Cody in order to lift his spirits.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S1 E2 An American Tradition The cowboys of Faith Cattle Company risk their safety while separating a rogue bull from their herd before it breeds with their cattle. Newlyweds and expectant parents, Bubba and Kaley, get their home and lives ready for their baby girl. Retired calf-roper, Cody, must put on a successful rodeo or risk losing a vital source of income for his young family. Booger, the expert horse trainer, gets a call from a distressed neighbor about an unruly mare. Booger agrees to help tame the horse, but if he can't do it, the horse will be put down.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S2 E20 The Horse Traders Kansas Sawyer is Lucas' friend who was cheated in a horse-trading deal. Lucas investigates Colonel Bourbon's operation and discovers his illegal process. He also learns that the horse Sawyer bought was stolen and is being sought after by outlaws.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S2 E21 The Spoiler An elderly couple move to North Fork and settle down under a false name to keep the town from knowing they are parents of a vicious killer on the loose. However, their plan fails when their son shows up and causes chaos.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: S1 E6 Dirge for the Scourge Jane is disgusted with the saloon and troublemakers, so she demands Captain Parmenter shut it down. Meanwhile, Sam Urp is in town, and after a few meetings, Parmenter is set on gunning him down. O'Rourke and Agarn must step in.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: S1 E7 The Girl from Philadelphia Lucy Landfield, Captain Parmenter's old girlfriend, visits Fort Courage with the hope of persuading him to go back East with her to Philadelphia, and away from his troop. However, Wrangler Jane foils her marriage plans to steal away Parmenter.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S3 E12 Annie Oakley & Buffalo Bill's Wild West Showdown When Buffalo Bill adds female sharpshooter Lillian Smith to his Wild West show, it jeopardizes his relationship with the show's current star, Annie Oakley. As the rivalry between Annie and Lillian escalates, the future of the show is put at risk.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S4 E1 Bat Masterson Leaves the West After leaving Dodge City, Bat Masterson takes a job as manager of Denver's Palace Theatre. There he falls in love with Emma Walter, a jugging virtuoso known as the Queen of Clubs, and begins to question his life as a gunslinger.

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier
programme.desc: S3 E1 Anne Bailey: Horseback Heroine After Anne Bailey's husband is killed by Native Americans, she defies the social norms of the frontier and becomes a horseback courier, risking her life to race through hostile territory delivering vital supplies to isolated forts and settlements.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: The Pups must help to find Mayor Humdinger's mustache after he accidentally shaves it off; after a carnival train gets stuck in a tunnel, it results in a mountainside funhouse-style wild ride.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Winnie Winnington goes looking for a frog to enter in a frog-jumping contest and ends up needing to be rescued in a swamp; the pups try to help salmon get to an ocean and also need to rescue Alex.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: When Mayor Humdinger hijacks Al's big rig carrying Luke Stars and his concert equipment, it's up to the pups to rescue him; when Al's load of pipes breaks loose, it's up to the pups to save their friends from the rolling hazards.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: When one of Humdinger's schemes goes awry, a Junkyard Kitten's home is destroyed and Rocky bites off more than he can chew when he invites the kitten to stay at the Lookout overnight.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Digi and Tal's inventions to help a busy Mayor Goodway go haywire and lead to a wild woodland chase; when Mayor Humdinger squeezes himself into the Trekkers' friendly dune buggy race, his cheating ways put the other racers in jeopardy.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: When Humdinger steals Farmer Al's super-powered seeds, Chickaletta joins the PAW Patrol to help stop the mayor's corny plan; when Humdinger steals Katie and Cali's tiaras, it's up to the pups to save their costumes and the pet show.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: While Humdinger gets dressed for a day with his Hummy Mummy, the Humsquatch accidentally puts on the mayor's suit and takes his place; when a precious bone goes missing, the Pups' only chance at getting it back is to team up with Sweetie.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Francois is directing a video when his camera crane rolls away; all the farm animals go missing from the Super Farm Fair.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: In Adventure Bay, a major bike race is underway, and nearly the entire town is participating; with so many bikes on the roads, maintaining safety is a challenge; Chase and his team of Safety and Rescue Pups are on the job.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: When the Adventure Bay potluck food goes missing, the Search and Rescue pups deputize the whole community to track it down.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ms. Marjorie is paddleboarding out to celebrate her anniversary with Hurricane Harrigan on Seal Island when she disappears!; Mayor Humdinger can't find his kitties, so he runs to the Safety and Rescue Pups for help!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Chickaletta's family is scattered around town, causing traffic jams; the Safety and Rescue Pups have to help the chickens cross the road; Chase leads a mission to rescue a lost Ryder which involves clues, tools and Chewington.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Mr. Park has trouble with a Chickaletta topiary, but when Digi and Tal try to help, things get worse!

programme.title: Sonic Prime
programme.desc: In the tropical No Place, Sonic meets a friendly band of pirates and their mysterious captain, who loves to party.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: The world needed a hero and it got a hedgehog. Powered with incredible speed, Sonic races across the globe to stop uncool evil genius Dr. Robotnik from achieving world domination.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: After being framed for the Puppy Co. leak, a fugitive Boss Baby goes on the lam and comes face to face with an old corporate rival.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Ever wonder what it's like to grow up in a big family? Eleven-year-old Lincoln Loud gives viewers an inside look at how to survive the chaos of a huge household, especially as the only boy with ten sisters!

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: When Lily and Jack must sacrifice their own summer plans, it kicks off a new, chaotic normal, starting with a runaway trailer that each insists on saving their own way.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton tries to befriend Squidward so he can get the Krabby Patty formula; the citizens of Bikini Bottom clamor for Patrick's artwork after an art critic praises him.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler has a hard time handling Kathy's new role in a play, in which she pretends to have sex with a handsome man.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler runs into Janice, now divorced, and finds her more irritating than ever; Ross plays rugby to impress Emily; Monica tries to figure out what a mysterious electrical switch in her new apartment does.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel throws Emily a phony going-away party so she can see Joshua outside of work, and pregnant Phoebe craves meat.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross has concerns about Emily's interests; Rachel's plans for Joshua are upset by a late change of venue.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross tries to keep Emily from returning to London; Monica and Rachel attempt to win back their apartment.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica and Phoebe find life in wedding attire has its charm; Rachel asks Joshua for more spontaneity.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy tries to help Sheldon get over his compulsive need for closure when one of his favorite TV shows is canceled; Raj discovers a secret about Lucy.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldon hire the host (Bob Newhart) of their favorite childhood TV show to perform; Bernadette and Howard run into trouble while dog-sitting for Raj's pet.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy and Sheldon's relationship takes a surprising turn during a game of "Dungeons & Dragons"; Lucy and Koothrappali have an awkward date.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Penny share secrets while Leonard is away; Wolowitz helps Raj get over his ex.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldon's friendship is tested; Wolowitz's relationship with his mom causes a threat to his masculinity.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel and Ross reminisce separately about when they dated each other; the friends get invitations to Ross's wedding, but not all of them are going.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: After Joey almost loses Ross' wedding ring, Ross asks both Joey and Chandler to serve as his best man; the girls host a baby shower for Phoebe.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel, Monica, Joey, Chandler and Ross go to London for the wedding where Joey meets Sarah Ferguson, the Duchess of York.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel frantically tries to get to London to tell Ross that she loves him before he marries Emily; Ross' parents argue with Emily's parents, Steven and Andrea Waltham.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross is distraught over the wedding; Emily punches Ross and flees from the reception; Monica and Chandler try to control their passions.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire decides to clean the clutter out of the house before taking over Jay's business; Jay's new hobby makes Cameron worry; Gloria enlists Mitchell to teach her how to golf so she can connect with Jay on a deeper level.

programme.title: Modern Family

programme.title: Squawk Box
programme.desc: The big names in business and politics tell their important stories in this pre-market morning news and talk program; from professional traders to casual investors.

programme.title: Squawk on the Street
programme.desc: Taking viewers onto the floor of the exchange, right to the posts where the big companies in the world trade; tick charts track the action of every trade of every stock; the treasury, currency and commodity action in real time.

programme.title: Money Movers
programme.desc: Anchors Carl Quintanilla and Sara Eisen focus on what is moving the stock markets, the agenda for the business day, detailed data on individual stocks, sectors and the indices that investors and traders want.

programme.title: Halftime Report
programme.desc: The front lines of market coverage; host Scott Wapner and the top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day.

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: Anchor Kelly Evans reports on the important stories to markets and investors; reporters provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch
programme.desc: Focusing on real-time market coverage, breaking news and up-to-the-instant stock moving information; delving into the economy, the markets, real estate, media and technology -- any place where there's money to be made.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: A guide through the most important hour of the Wall Street trading day, and taking a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting; coverage includes reports from the CME Group, NASDAQ and the NYSE.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: A look at after-hours moves, including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading; big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day.

programme.title: Fast Money
programme.desc: The information normally reserved for the Wall Street trading floor, enabling viewers to make decisions that give them a chance to make money; the news with an angle that won't be seen until tomorrow's papers.

programme.title: Mad Money
programme.desc: Taking viewers inside the mind of one of Wall Street's most respected and successful money managers; Jim Cramer guides viewers through the confusing jungle of Wall Street investing, navigating through both opportunities and pitfalls.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: Entrepreneurs present spellbinding, spine-tingling business opportunities; Blumhouse CEO and founder Jason Blum joins the panel as a guest shark.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: Life-sized, scientifically accurate animatronic dinosaurs; a caffeinated beverage inspired by Vietnamese heritage; beverage coolers; a tool that helps parents conquer potty training.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: Guest shark Peter Jones; a luxury apparel line designed to elevate one's office look; a portable way to enjoy beverages on tap; a fruit preservation device; a fruit-infused wine collection; an update on Curie, a natural product line.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A learning platform to empower students to reach their creative potential through art; an oat-based spread; a boozy spin on a wedding day essential; a fun and edible innovation designed to reduce single-use plastics; guest shark Daniel Lubetzky.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: An easy-to-use organic skin care product line born from a personal need; confidence-boosting swimwear; a convenient tool that helps combat an annoying problem; a jewelry brand made from a unique recycled material; an update on Bunch Bikes.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A new take on a traditional snack food; a single-serve all-in-one portable coffee product; a beverage line made from real herbs, fruits and flowers; a patented design that makes taking care of newborns easier.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: Entrepreneurs present spellbinding, spine-tingling business opportunities; Blumhouse CEO and founder Jason Blum joins the panel as a guest shark.

programme.desc: Amber Dubois disappears in the San Diego area and the search turns up nothing. A year later, Chelsea King disappears in a neighboring town. Investigators are determined to find out if the two cases are connected.

programme.title: Patton
programme.desc: (1970) Multi-Oscar-winning, fact-based, Second World War drama starring George C Scott, who gives a vivid portrait of the famously straight-talking US commander General George Patton.

programme.title: Mrs Doubtfire

programme.title: Lola

programme.title: Car Repair Secrets!
programme.desc: Save thousands on car repairs.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Earp and Shotgun Gibbs investigate the poisoning of a reviled loan shark and find many citizens with a motive to want the man dead, including a bank clerk with a large gambling debt.

programme.title: Charade
programme.desc: After Regina Lampert (Audrey Hepburn) falls for the dashing Peter Joshua (Cary Grant) on a skiing holiday in the French Alps, she discovers upon her return to Paris that her husband has been murdered. Soon, she and Peter are giving chase to three of her late husband's World War II cronies, Tex (James Coburn), Scobie (George Kennedy) and Gideon (Ned Glass), who are after a quarter of a million dollars the quartet stole while behind enemy lines. But why does Peter keep changing his name?

programme.title: Pillow Talk
programme.desc: Playboy songwriter Brad Allen's (Rock Hudson) succession of romances annoys his neighbor, interior designer Jan Morrow (Doris Day), who shares a telephone party line with him and hears all his breezy routines. After Jan unsuccessfully lodges a complaint against him, Brad sets about to seduce her in the guise of a sincere and upstanding Texas rancher. When mutual friend Jonathan (Tony Randall) discovers that his best friend is moving in on the girl he desires, however, sparks fly.

programme.title: Saddles and Sagebrush
programme.desc: A rancher (Russell Hayden) joins an outlaw gang to figure out how to stop it.

programme.title: Raton Pass
programme.desc: Homesteaders help a husband (Dennis Morgan) fight his wife (Patricia Neal) and her gunman (Steve Cochran) for their New Mexico ranch.

programme.title: The Man From the Alamo
programme.desc: As the Texan militia inside the Alamo braces for Gen. Santa Anna's attack, soldier John Stroud (Glenn Ford) is chosen to go to the nearby town of Ox Bow to warn the women and children. He arrives to the scene of a massacre, with his wife and young son among the victims, perpetrated by a gang of Texans fighting for the Mexican side and led by the outlaw Jess Wade (Victor Jory). Branded a deserter for having left the Alamo before its fall, Stroud infiltrates Wade's gang to extract his revenge.

programme.title: Coroner Creek
programme.desc: A gunfighter (Randolph Scott) loses his beloved in a robbery and hunts the man (George Macready) to blame, who is living off the loot.

programme.title: El Dorado
programme.desc: Heartless tycoon Bart Jason (Edward Asner) hires a group of thugs to force the MacDonald family out of El Dorado so he can claim their land. J.P. Harrah, the town's sheriff, is too deep in the throes of alcoholism to help the family. When Harrah's friend, noble elder gunfighter Cole Thorton (John Wayne), learns of the predicament, he travels to El Dorado with his upstart friend, Mississippi (James Caan), to help Harrah clean up in time for a shootout against Jason's men.

programme.title: The Great Gatsby
programme.desc: Nick Carraway (Sam Waterston) is a young man from the Midwest living modestly among the decadent mansions of 1920s Long Island. He becomes involved in the life of the mysterious Jay Gatsby (Robert Redford), a rich man who throws the most lavish parties on the island. But behind Gatsby's outgoing demeanor is a lonely man who wants nothing more than to be with his old love, Daisy (Mia Farrow). She is married to the bullheaded Tom (Bruce Dern), creating a love triangle that will end in tragedy.

programme.title: An Affair to Remember
programme.desc: A man and a woman have a romance while on a cruise from Europe to New York. Despite being engaged to other people, both agree to reunite at the top of the Empire State Building in six months. However, an unfortunate accident keeps her from the reunion, and he fears that she has married or does not love him anymore.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Shotgun Gibbs, smitten with hat merchant Phronsie LaTour, agrees to protect her from a suspicious man; Earp tries to foil a gang's plot to rob the railroad by intercepting the gang leader's informant, said to be a pretty blonde.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Bat returns to Dodge City to buy the Lone Star Saloon but faces reprisal from rival saloon owner Mike de Graff, who wants to see the Lone Star torn down; fed up with Dodge's shady businesses, Mayor Kelley decides to drive out the saloons entirely.

programme.title: The Fatal Mallet
programme.desc: Three men play dirty tricks to charm a beautiful young woman.

programme.title: Taming of the West
programme.desc: A new lawman (Bill Elliott) punches out cattle rustlers who like to shoot sheriffs.

programme.title: To Catch a Thief
programme.desc: Notorious cat burglar John Robie (Cary Grant) has long since retired to tend vineyards on the French Riviera. When a series of robberies is committed in his style, John must clear his name. Armed with a list of people who own the most expensive jewels currently in the area, John begins following the first owner, young Francie (Grace Kelly). When her jewels are stolen, Francie suspects John, destroying their tentative romance. John goes on the lam to catch the thief and clear his own name.

programme.title: Paid Programming: Carshield -- Cars Have Changed
Face of a Fugitive
programme.desc: While being escorted to jail, bank robber Jim Larson (Fred MacMurray) manages to get the upper hand on his captor and escape. Jim is surprised to see his brother appear on the scene, ready to aid his sibling. As they make their getaway, his brother and the pursuing lawman shoot each other, leaving the stunned Jim alone and on the run. Assuming a different identity, Jim travels to a mining town and befriends the local sheriff (Lin McCarthy), hoping to start over and find redemption.

programme.title: Raton Pass
programme.desc: Homesteaders help a husband (Dennis Morgan) fight his wife (Patricia Neal) and her gunman (Steve Cochran) for their New Mexico ranch.

programme.title: Coroner Creek
programme.desc: A gunfighter (Randolph Scott) loses his beloved in a robbery and hunts the man (George Macready) to blame, who is living off the loot.

However, an unfortunate accident keeps her from the reunion, and he fears that she has married or does not love him anymore.

programme.title: To Catch a Thief
programme.desc: A retired cat burglar (Cary Grant) sees fireworks with an American heiress (Grace Kelly) on the Riviera.

programme.title: Santa Fe Trail
programme.desc: Jeb Stuart and George Custer get stationed at Fort Leavenworth in Kansas and work together to stop abolitionist John Brown.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: When gang members feed Shotgun Gibbs' mule, Roscoe, a deadly amount of alcohol, Earp sends for Doc Fabrique to treat the animal while he pushes ahead and tracks down the group responsible, but Shotgun's fury imperils the situation.

programme.title: The Casebook of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: In the most dangerous assignment of his career, Holmes is asked to stop the marriage of Violet Merville to Baron Gruner.

programme.title: Life Outreach Mission Feeding
programme.desc: The hosts shed light on an initiative by a Christian organisation to fulfil the nutritional needs of malnourished children across Africa.

programme.title: King of the Bandits
programme.desc: The Cisco Kid and Pancho track an outlaw responsible for a series of stagecoach robberies and masquerading as the Kid.

programme.title: Emma: Natural Relief for Bloating, Constipation & Gut Imbalance
programme.desc: Tired of bloating or gut issues that won't go away? Discover the root cause-and how Emma can help eliminate methane-producing archaea, reset digestion, and restore balance naturally.

programme.title: Ministry - Your Words Have Power with Joyce Meyer
programme.desc: Your words hold incredible power; today, Joyce reveals how the things you say can impact your life in profound ways.

programme.title: Word of God Ministries
programme.desc: Pastor James McMenis and his wife Chrissy are dedicated to winning the lost to Jesus and making disciples of the saved. Their goal is to bring clarity to the Word of God, making it life-applicable to people everywhere.

programme.title: Annie Get Your Gun
programme.desc: The musical tale of Annie Oakley (Betty Hutton) moves from stage to screen in this rollicking film adaptation. Renowned in the Wild West as a sharpshooter, Annie meets her match, both romantically and professionally, in the form of fellow ace gunslinger Frank Butler (Howard Keel). While Annie and Frank are performing as part of the famous traveling show headlined by the legendary Buffalo Bill (Louis Calhern), the two compete and flirt, with plenty of ups and downs along the way.

programme.title: It Happened One Night
programme.desc: In Frank Capra's acclaimed romantic comedy, spoiled heiress Ellie Andrews (Claudette Colbert) impetuously marries the scheming King Westley, leading her tycoon father (Walter Connolly) to spirit her away on his yacht. After jumping ship, Ellie falls in with cynical newspaper reporter Peter Warne (Clark Gable), who offers to help her reunite with her new husband in exchange for an exclusive story. But during their travels, the reporter finds himself falling for the feisty young heiress.

programme.title: Oliver!
programme.desc: In this award-winning adaptation of the Broadway musical based on the Charles Dickens novel, 9-year-old orphan Oliver Twist (Mark Lester) falls in with a group of street-urchin pickpockets led by the Artful Dodger (Jack Wild) and masterminded by the criminal Fagin (Ron Moody). When Oliver's intended mark, Mr. Brownlow (Joseph O'Conor), takes pity on the lad and offers him a home, Fagin's henchman Bill Sikes (Oliver Reed) plots to kidnap the boy to keep him from talking.

programme.title: All the King's Men
programme.desc: Drama about the rise and fall of a corrupt southern governor who promises his way to power. Broderick Crawford portrays Willie Stark, who, once he is elected, finds that his vanity and power lust prove to be his downfall. The film is based on the 1946 Pulitzer Prize-winning novel by Robert Penn Warren.

programme.title: Come Back, Little Sheba
programme.desc: Two decades after their hasty wedding, Doc (Burt Lancaster) and Lola (Shirley Booth) are stuck in a deadening and loveless marriage. Doc, who dropped out of medical school when Lola got pregnant, blames Lola for the loss of his life's dream. Lola, who never recovered emotionally from the miscarriage she suffered shortly after their wedding, still mourns the loss of her beloved dog, Sheba. When a beautiful young lodger (Terry Moore) enters their home, long-repressed emotions explode.

programme.desc: Love You to Death: Classic detective series. Dempsey is stalked by a psychopathic admirer who hates Makepeace for being with him and has a deadly way of showing her affection. S2 Ep3

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: Let Me Hear the Music: Classic US action drama series. When Thomas is hired to find the sheet music for five lost songs, he learns that their true authorship is very complicated. S5 Ep14

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: The Forgotten Room: Classic US detective drama. Theo investigates a murder that may have been committed by a fellow Greek-American and which stirs up resentment in the community. S3 Ep16

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Love Letters from a Dead Man: Classic drama starring Michael Elphick. Ken investigates how a man can be sending letters from beyond the grave, and Harry helps a racing cyclist. S4 Ep9

programme.desc: Visiting Fireman: Classic police drama series. Shebbeq, a Turkish police officer, gets Regan involved in a top-secret government deal. S3 Ep3

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers

programme.desc: Wicked Weather: Nail-biting documentary series. Lisa Kelly is asked to deliver a heavy load to Prudhoe Bay, but the 400-mile trip is put on hold by an approaching storm. S3 Ep7

programme.desc: Hard-hitting action from the world of All Elite Wrestling - the roster features world-class talent including Jon Moxley, Toni Storm, MJF, Ricochet and Adam Page.

programme.desc: The Assassination of Dino Bravo: Wrestling documentary series. Family and friends of Dino Bravo relive his descent from being Montreal's favourite wrestling son to a mob enforcer. S2 Ep6
